run.name: Duplicate PR Detection - Calibration Standard Double-Order
run.current_status_text: Human-in-the-loop decision required — select how to proceed with duplicate PR

logs.message: New purchase requisition PR-2026-06142 received - extracting and validating details from SAP Ariba

reasoning_steps: New PR-2026-06142 submitted by Dr. Elena Kowalski (Bioassay Laboratory, Kastrup)
Connecting to SAP Ariba to extract full requisition details
Material: EP Follitropin Alpha CRS - 12 vials at EUR 285/vial
Total value: EUR 3,420 | Supplier: MilliporeSigma | GxP-Critical
Running PR submission validations (V1-V6):
V1: All required fields populated - PASS
V2: Total estimated value EUR 3,420 > 0 - PASS
V3: Cost center BIO-DK-4200 has sufficient uncommitted budget (EUR 28,400 available) - PASS
V4: GL account 6200-3100 matches spend category GXP-REF mapping - PASS
V5: Requested delivery date April 21 >= PR date + 5 business days (April 16) - PASS
V6: Supplier MilliporeSigma (V-10023) on AVL with status Approved for GXP-LAB, GXP-REF - PASS
All 6 submission validations passed - PR cleared for processing

logs.message: Duplicate detected - PR-2026-06142 matches existing requisition PR-2026-06078 with 91% similarity

reasoning_steps: Running duplicate detection against all open requisitions in SAP Ariba
Rule DUP-1: Same material check - EP Follitropin Alpha CRS - MATCH
Rule DUP-2: Same supplier check - MilliporeSigma (V-10023) - MATCH
Rule DUP-3: Time window check - 7 days apart (within 30-day threshold) - MATCH
Rule DUP-4: Description similarity - 91% (above 85% threshold) - MATCH
Existing PR-2026-06078 identified (Dr. Tomás Reiner, Formulation Development)
Retrieving existing requisition from SAP Ariba for side-by-side comparison

logs.message: GxP-Critical material detected - sending QA Manager approval request via email

reasoning_steps: PR-2026-06142 classified as GxP-Critical (Calibration Standard used in potency assays)
Per approval matrix: GxP-Critical materials require QA Manager sign-off before further processing
QA Manager for Kastrup site: Dr. Henrik Madsen (Quality Assurance)
Preparing approval request email with PR details, AVL verification, and GxP classification
Attaching PR-2026-06142 PDF and supplier qualification summary for review
Email dispatched to dr.madsen@ferring.com - awaiting approval response

logs.message: QA approval request sent to Dr. Henrik Madsen

email_draft.body:
Dear Dr. Madsen,

A new Purchase Requisition requires your QA approval as it involves a GxP-Critical material.

PR Details:
- PR Number: PR-2026-06142
- Requester: Dr. Elena Kowalski (Bioassay Laboratory, Kastrup)
- Material: EP Follitropin Alpha CRS (Calibration Standard)
- Quantity: 12 vials | Unit Price: EUR 285/vial | Total: EUR 3,420
- Supplier: MilliporeSigma (V-10023)
- AVL Status: Approved | GMP Certified: Yes
- GxP Classification: GxP-Critical (Calibration Standard)

Supplier Qualification Summary:
- MilliporeSigma (V-10023) is on the Approved Vendor List for categories GXP-LAB and GXP-REF
- Last supplier quality audit: November 2025 (within annual audit cycle)
- Risk Rating: Low
- GMP certification current and valid

Please review and reply with your approval or any concerns.

Regards,
Pace - Procurement Automation
Ferring Pharmaceuticals
email_draft.subject: QA APPROVAL REQUIRED: PR-2026-06142 - GxP-Critical Calibration Standard

logs.message: QA Manager approval received - Dr. Henrik Madsen has approved PR-2026-06142 for GxP-Critical procurement

reasoning_steps: Incoming email detected from dr.madsen@ferring.com (QA Manager, Kastrup)
Subject: RE: QA APPROVAL REQUIRED: PR-2026-06142 - GxP-Critical Calibration Standard
Parsing email content for approval decision
Email body: 'Approved. MilliporeSigma is a qualified supplier for EP Follitropin Alpha CRS. Supplier audit is current (Nov 2025). No concerns with this requisition. - Dr. H. Madsen, QA Manager'
Decision extracted: APPROVED
QA approval logged against PR-2026-06142 in SAP Ariba audit trail
PR cleared for next processing stage - proceeding to duplicate resolution workflow

logs.message: QA Manager approval email received and processed

email_draft.body:
Approved. MilliporeSigma is a qualified supplier for EP Follitropin Alpha CRS. Supplier audit is current (Nov 2025). No concerns with this requisition.

- Dr. Henrik Madsen
QA Manager, Kastrup Site
Ferring Pharmaceuticals
email_draft.subject: RE: QA APPROVAL REQUIRED: PR-2026-06142 - GxP-Critical Calibration Standard

logs.message: Duplicate confirmed - notifying requestor with resolution options

reasoning_steps: PR-2026-06142 (Dr. Kowalski, 12 vials, EUR 3,420) is a 91% match to PR-2026-06078 (Dr. Reiner, 15 vials, EUR 4,275)
Same material, same supplier, submitted 7 days apart
Three resolution paths identified: Consolidate, Proceed Separately, or Cancel
Consolidation could save EUR 340 (volume discount + single shipment)
Generating resolution options document with impact analysis for each path
Sending notification email to requestor and stakeholders

logs.message: Notification sent to requestor with resolution options

email_draft.body:
Dear Dr. Kowalski,

A potential duplicate has been identified for your Purchase Requisition PR-2026-06142.

Your Request (PR-2026-06142):
- Material: EP Follitropin Alpha CRS (Calibration Standard)
- Quantity: 12 vials | Value: EUR 3,420
- Supplier: MilliporeSigma | Submitted: April 9

Existing Order (PR-2026-06078 - 91% match):
- Requester: Dr. Tomás Reiner (Formulation Development)
- Quantity: 15 vials | Value: EUR 4,275 | Same supplier
- Status: PO dispatched, delivery expected April 14
- Submitted: April 2 (7 days before your request)

Please review the attached Resolution Options document for a full impact analysis of each path. A separate action request will follow shortly for your decision.

Regards,
Pace - Procurement Automation
Ferring Pharmaceuticals
email_draft.subject: Duplicate Detected: PR-2026-06142 matches existing PR-2026-06078

logs.message: Action required - please select how to proceed with the duplicate PR

email_draft.body:
Dear Dr. Kowalski,

PR-2026-06142 has been placed on HOLD pending your decision. Please review the Resolution Options document sent earlier and select one of the following:

------------------------------------
Option 1: CONSOLIDATE
------------------------------------
Merge into a single order of 27 vials under PR-2026-06078.
Saves EUR 340 (volume discount + single shipment).

------------------------------------
Option 2: PROCEED SEPARATELY
------------------------------------
Process PR-2026-06142 as an independent order.
Business justification required.

------------------------------------
Option 3: CANCEL DUPLICATE
------------------------------------
Withdraw PR-2026-06142 entirely.
Existing order PR-2026-06078 continues unchanged.

Please respond via the dashboard to proceed.

Regards,
Pace - Procurement Automation
Ferring Pharmaceuticals
email_draft.subject: ACTION REQUIRED: PR-2026-06142 - Select Resolution for Duplicate
